name: talha-portfolio
description: Premium developer portfolio for Talha Khan. Architected with a terminal-inspired tech aesthetic to showcase low-level firmware engineering, embedded systems (STM32, FreeRTOS), bare-metal computing, microservices, and multi-node HomeLAB virtualization clusters.

author.name: Haris Khan
author.description: A passionate software developer specializing in web development, with a strong focus on Next.js and Tailwind CSS. With a keen eye for design and a commitment to creating seamless user experiences, I bring ideas to life through clean, efficient code. My portfolio showcases a range of projects that highlight my expertise in building responsive, high-performance websites and applications. I am dedicated to continuous learning and staying up-to-date with the latest industry trends to deliver innovative solutions that exceed client expectations.
